{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032113112447653F5191D200A8A648\"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572092766934221630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对初级读书者来说是很大的福音，写的很好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763018891,"group_id":"7424825773623626777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwi2lequ+zyjRekJqdpDJTk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"93158253908","user_name":"喜欢寒竹的东方玉灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93158253908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424825773623626777","book_info":{"abstract":"本书以努尔哈赤晏驾叆鸡堡为开篇，以太平天国运动失败为结束，是一部系统反映大清王朝兴衰的长篇历史小说。该书全景式地展现了从明末到清末经济、政治、社会、文化历经的巨大变化，谱写了大清王朝从一统江山，到辉煌盛世，再到衰败的宏伟史诗，再现了大清王朝近三百年的各种风云际会，浓墨重彩地刻画了皇太极、多尔衮、乾隆、慈禧等近百位性格各异、丰满多姿的艺术群像。作品阐述了几乎所有的重大事件和民俗风情，而又给予个性的艺术审美，是一部清朝历史题材的长卷力作。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2a0b9ac6a3be1d9600edf8036b761b9e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青未了","author_id":"","book_id":"7424825773623626777","book_name":"大清王朝（全五册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f84018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"36.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":988
